description_long: This is a medium-sized lotion bottle with a semi-translucent, frosted body and a black plastic pump dispenser on top. The bottle features a combination of printed text and colorful graphics, including botanical illustrations and branding elements. The front label displays the product name 'CASTANHA' and the brand 'EKOS', along with additional descriptive text and volume information (400ml). The back and side labels contain further product details, ingredients, and usage instructions, printed on a brownish background. The bottle's shape is slightly conical, tapering towards the top, and the pump mechanism is cylindrical with a flat, wide actuator. The overall design is modern and visually appealing, with a focus on natural and botanical themes.
description: A frosted lotion bottle with a black pump dispenser, botanical graphics, and detailed labeling. The design is modern and features prominent branding and colorful illustrations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the product name 'CASTANHA', brand 'EKOS', and main label with botanical graphics.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the brown label with product details and ingredients, less branding visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting a large brown label with text and a partial view of the colorful graphics.
description_view_3: Angled front view showing both the main label with branding and a portion of the botanical illustration.
